# Handle Types
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AppService/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppServiceEnvironmentResource

Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AppService/skipEnvironmentVariableNameChecks() -> Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IComputeResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AppService/withAzureApplicationInsights() -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AppService/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppServiceEnvironmentResource
